data.comment: Great Marketer, Reputable Creator in Trad Fashion, Friend

translation.translatedContent: Great Marketer, Reputable Creator in Trad Fashion, Friend
translation.translatedDescription:
Cristian always shows up to give his best. He is a great friend, trustworthy, always willing to recommend others to roles or projects.

Not many people know this but he's also a very successful creator in the traditional fashion industry on Instagram.

Knows a lot about marketing, would recommend him as an advisor or contractor any day

translation.translatedDescription: I was feeling a bit stuck in my own web3 bubble and wanted to join some new groups  that’s how I ended up discovering the Gorilla community through your group. I had already seen your videos, so I decided to join, and it’s been a great decision so far. The people are amazing  always good conversations, solid calls, and they truly live and breathe web3. I’m really glad I got to know them!

data.author: 0xCfedD5b3aae8a2C0eB6cD94d547d971092C95029
data.subject: 0x253a41571830Dca332724DFF29Afb8960ffcCDf6
data.metadata: {"description":"Ely is a committed interviewer whose X posts sometimes feel provocative. I’m not a fan of how frequently he teases followers about going bald he needs to either embrace a full bald look to own the joke for his community or incorporate a subtle bald spot motif into an abstract logo for his redemption."}

translation.translatedDescription: Ely is a committed interviewer whose X posts sometimes feel provocative. I’m not a fan of how frequently he teases followers about going bald he needs to either embrace a full bald look to own the joke for his community or incorporate a subtle bald spot motif into an abstract logo for his redemption.

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0xA0aCD401Dde7cAF2683C9Bc03B0F093570D2575D
data.metadata:
{"description":"OG is an essential figure in the Abstract community.
He founded AOB and built a real ecosystem.
What I appreciate about him is his humility, as well as his deep sensitivity.
Most of his posts are thoughtful and provide valuable advice.
You can tell he enjoys living in the Web3 world, especially on Abstract, where he seems to have found a place where he can fully unleash his potential."}

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0x253a41571830Dca332724DFF29Afb8960ffcCDf6
data.metadata: {"description":"Véritable pilier de l’écosystème Abstract, il se distingue par la qualité de ses streams et de son contenu. Toujours à l’écoute de la communauté, il partage des analyses pertinentes et des informations justes, ce qui en fait une source fiable et respectée. Son influence positive contribue largement à renforcer la cohésion et la compréhension autour du projet Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription: A true pillar of the Abstract ecosystem, he stands out for the quality of his streams and content. Always attentive to the community, he shares relevant analyses and accurate information, making him a reliable and respected source. His positive influence greatly contributes to strengthening cohesion and understanding around the Abstract project.

data.author: 0xDd6982B474124e56cE3637f515C8b39CCC842B83
data.subject: 0x4F2333A3CAED18ba4b34926EE7EC98777Af91a50
data.metadata: {"description":"Moew is an incredibly vibrant and approachable person—so integral to the Abstract Chinese community that we often joke, \"The Abstract Chinese community can’t do without Moew, just as the West can’t do without Jerusalem.\"\nWhether it comes to work or daily life, she embodies remarkable patience and a strong sense of responsibility. When tackling work tasks, she never rushes through details; instead, she takes the time to listen to everyone’s ideas, offer thoughtful feedback, and see projects through to the end, ensuring every step meets the highest standards. In life, too, she’s the kind of friend everyone turns to—when someone is stressed or confused, she’ll sit with them calmly, lend a listening ear, and help sort through problems with gentle wisdom, making even the most overwhelming moments feel manageable."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Moew is an incredibly vibrant and approachable person—so integral to the Abstract Chinese community that we often joke, "The Abstract Chinese community can’t do without Moew, just as the West can’t do without Jerusalem."
Whether it comes to work or daily life, she embodies remarkable patience and a strong sense of responsibility. When tackling work tasks, she never rushes through details; instead, she takes the time to listen to everyone’s ideas, offer thoughtful feedback, and see projects through to the end, ensuring every step meets the highest standards. In life, too, she’s the kind of friend everyone turns to—when someone is stressed or confused, she’ll sit with them calmly, lend a listening ear, and help sort through problems with gentle wisdom, making even the most overwhelming moments feel manageable.

data.author: 0x4F2333A3CAED18ba4b34926EE7EC98777Af91a50
data.subject: 0x607d2381aFecbD80c4AD5CCE8059205C2a297966

translation.translatedDescription:
So happy to finally meet the Abstract Chain family IRL 🫶
I’ve been seeing sillybilly’s posts on Twitter for so long, and gotta say — his content is always on point: clear, thoughtful, and makes Abstract Chain even easier to love 💚

So glad to have new friends in Thailand! I’ll be back soon — fish dinner with you and Nat is a must! 🐟

data.author: 0x4F2333A3CAED18ba4b34926EE7EC98777Af91a50
data.subject: 0xDd6982B474124e56cE3637f515C8b39CCC842B83
data.comment: The one and only best duck!

translation.translatedContent: The one and only best duck!
translation.translatedDescription:
From the very first day at Abstract Chain, Duck has been helping the Chinese community grow — answering questions, sharing updates, and keeping everyone informed about every move in the Abstract ecosystem.

His posts are always great, and he’s incredibly responsible and patient. 💚

Honestly, without Duck, the Chinese community wouldn’t be nearly as organized. Thank you 鸭鸭！💚

I enjoy reading this gigachad every day.
Very relevant and passionate content creator.

translation.translatedDescription:
I met Meow during KBW in Korea while participated in Abstract and Pudgy Penguin events. Once I got to talk to her and we exchanged our twitters, she is one of a few that told me she saw my content before while showing her appreciation to this contribution toward Abstract

this is something really small but means a lot especially to those who're contributing to any community out there. since we've been joining many events there and met her couple times, I could say that she is the one who truly cares to surrounded people

data.metadata: {"description":"I adore Elisa for her completely unfiltered and honest takes on the TL, it brings a very refreshing and authentic energy. Speaking with her is always a pleasure, super kind, loving and means well. Love her!"}

translation.translatedDescription: I adore Elisa for her completely unfiltered and honest takes on the TL, it brings a very refreshing and authentic energy. Speaking with her is always a pleasure, super kind, loving and means well. Love her!

data.author: 0xc9F4067a38878A4CdC2cdd525F090Aa8BA0aC18a
data.subject: 0x886Ee2E8B19874C0d31A5691431e46e0a75A967a
data.metadata: {"description":"Мы не знаем друг друга лично, но его вовлеченность в Sophon просто поразительна. Мне кажется, что мы сможем сделать что-то особенное для этого проекта (граффити). Мне понравилось, что он поделился отзывом о моем искусстве напрямую."}

translation.translatedDescription: We don't know each other personally, but his involvement in Sophon is simply amazing. It seems to me that we can do something special for this project (graffiti). I liked that he shared feedback about my art directly.

data.author: 0xeA43D9d2b85a363d8e760F936b05978B853F24c4
data.subject: 0x253a41571830Dca332724DFF29Afb8960ffcCDf6
data.metadata: {"description":"We can write too much about Ely, because his effort is so huge. Can't even count how many people he onboard and guide to Abstract and people who's already been on-chain. Absolutely can't skip that fact, that he is CEO of one of the most popular projects in Abstract ecosystem"}

translation.translatedDescription: We can write too much about Ely, because his effort is so huge. Can't even count how many people he onboard and guide to Abstract and people who's already been on-chain. Absolutely can't skip that fact, that he is CEO of one of the most popular projects in Abstract ecosystem

Happy to met him in huddle. Fifi like an engine for Pudgy Europe local community.

data.metadata: {"description":"Elisa has been in Web 3 for as long as I remember. She always produce fun and and interesting content for Web 3. I really do think her content is fun and also very informative.\n\nShe is a good exmaple of creator who has fun with her career."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Elisa has been in Web 3 for as long as I remember. She always produce fun and and interesting content for Web 3. I really do think her content is fun and also very informative.

She is a good exmaple of creator who has fun with her career.
